title: put() version guard fires before any network call
description: The pinned-version check in put() uses self.version \!= 'latest' and returns InvalidUri before constructing the URL or touching reqwest. This is correct: the error is a construction-time misconfiguration (wrong URI), not a runtime fault. A contributor might be tempted to move this check after the URL build or to return Backend instead of InvalidUri — both would be wrong. InvalidUri signals 'fix your config'; Backend signals 'retry later'.
